text.title: Market Research TAM SAM SOM Worked Example
text.summary: One worked end-to-end example showing a Market Research TAM SAM SOM artefact filled from a realistic input bundle. Trace runs from input brief → evidence gathering → schema fill → validator pass → review surfacing.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: A solopreneur runs Market Research TAM SAM SOM against a single input bundle pulled from their working materials. They expect the artefact to be auditable by a downstream named reviewer without re-deriving the reasoning.

list.item: Source-of-truth refs: 1 transcript URL, 1 dashboard snapshot, 1 prior-cycle artefact.
Triggering activity matches AGENTS.md "Applies If" list.
Step 2 — evidence array populated with ≥1 citation per non-trivial field.
